description: You are a physiologist analyzing a skeletal muscle biopsy to assess fiber size (atrophy/hypertrophy). Segment individual muscle fibers from the histological cross-section at ~/Fiji_Data/workspace/muscle_task/muscle_section.jpg and calculate their Mean Cross-Sectional Area (CSA). Use a scale of 1 pixel = 0.5 microns. When processing, ensure touching fibers are separated and filter the results to include only objects with an area between 500 um^2 and 20000 um^2. Save the detailed measurements to ~/Fiji_Data/results/muscle/results.csv, a visualization of the segmentation to ~/Fiji_Data/results/muscle/segmentation_check.png, and a text report containing the calculated Mean Fiber CSA in um^2 to ~/Fiji_Data/results/muscle/report.txt.
